name: list_price
label: List Price
help_text: Standard catalog price. Read-only. Auto-populated from Pricebook Entry

name: sub_total
label: Sub Total
help_text: Read-only. Rollup SUM of all Quote Line Item total prices

name: quote_number
description: System generated unique sequential quote number
label: Quote Number
help_text: Auto-generated. Format: Q-00001. Cannot be edited manually

name: is_syncing
description: Indicates if this quote is syncing totals back to the parent Opportunity
label: Is Syncing
help_text: System controlled. Only 1 quote per Opportunity can sync at a time

name: payment_terms
description: Payment terms agreed with the customer for this quote
label: Payment Terms
help_text: Select the agreed payment schedule for this quote

name: total_discount
description: Total discount amount applied to this quote
label: Total Discount
